instructions.html: For document types DEED - HILTON HEAD,DEED,EASEMENT, or EASEMENT - HILTON HEAD:  Please enter $0.00 for the consideration if the consideration amount is less than $100.00.
All Deeds, Except Quit-Claim Deeds, Must Contain The Name Of The Preparer, Known As A Preparation Clause.
